label: Scatter lumps mineable
description: Scatters irregular lumps of mineable rock across the map, optionally overriding the biome-determined ore type.

forcedDefToScatter.label: Forced def to scatter
forcedDefToScatter.description: ThingDef overriding the biome-determined mineable type for all lumps.

forcedLumpSize.label: Forced lump size
forcedLumpSize.description: Fixed number of cells per lump, overriding the ThingDef's mineableScatterLumpSizeRange.

maxValue.label: Max value
maxValue.description: Maximum base market value per cell for randomly chosen mineables. Ores above this value are excluded.

useNomadicMineables.label: Use nomadic mineables
useNomadicMineables.description: When true, count is scaled by the storyteller's nomadic mineable resources factor on non-starting maps.
